body_html:
Mast cell stabilising allergy formula.

What it does

Our mast-cell stabilising formula for the Highveld pollen season. Antihistamines block the histamine after it's released; this formulation works upstream, helping mast cells stay calm so less histamine is released in the first place — without the drowsiness.

How to use it

1 capsule twice daily, starting 2 weeks before your season (mid-August for Gauteng spring). Steady use beats rescue dosing.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Suits

Gluten free, sugar free, dairy free, vegetarian, SA-made.

Supplements support a good routine — they don't replace one. If you take chronic medication, check with your pharmacist before combining.

Whole-leaf greens nutrition.

What it does

Young barley leaf, harvested before the grain forms — alkalising greens with chlorophyll, minerals, and enzymes. The everyday greens habit for people who don't eat enough green vegetables (most of us).

How to use it

Capsules: 3–4 daily with water. Powder: 1 teaspoon in water or a smoothie each morning.

On the label

Juglone-rich antiparasitic.

What it does

Black walnut hull is juglone-rich — the compound responsible for its traditional anti-parasitic reputation. It's the first leg of the classic cleanse trio (black walnut, wormwood, clove) and also a bitter digestive tonic in its own right.

How to use it

1 capsule with breakfast and dinner during a cleanse cycle (commonly 2–4 weeks). Often run alongside Wormwood and Clove. Not for use in pregnancy.

On the label

460 mg black walnut herb extract (4:1) per capsule — printed on the bottle.

Suits

Gluten free, sugar free, dairy free, vegetarian, SA-made.

Supplements support a good routine — they don't replace one. If you take chronic medication, check with your pharmacist before combining.

Complete bone matrix formula.

What it does

A complete bone-matrix formula — because bone is living tissue that needs more than calcium. The formulation covers the full team: the minerals that build the matrix and the cofactor vitamins that direct them into bone instead of arteries. Family-size bottle, built for the long game.

How to use it

2 capsules twice daily with meals. Bone remodels on a months-long cycle — this is a 6-month commitment, not a 6-day one. Weight-bearing exercise multiplies the effect.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Capsaicin for metabolism and circulation.

What it does

Cayenne's active, capsaicin, is a circulatory stimulant with a long traditional record for sluggish circulation, cold extremities, and metabolic support. It also primes digestion — a small dose before meals wakes up gastric secretions. This is heat with a job to do.

How to use it

1 capsule with food, once or twice daily. Build up slowly if you're heat-sensitive. Never on an empty stomach.

On the label

Supplements support a good routine — they don't replace one. If you take chronic medication, check with your pharmacist before combining.

Eugenol-rich antiparasitic gut support.

What it does

Clove is one of the most eugenol-dense botanicals known. In traditional anti-parasite protocols it's the third leg of the classic trio — used alongside black walnut and wormwood, because clove addresses the egg stage the other two don't. Outside cleanse protocols it's a warming digestive with one of the highest ORAC scores ever measured.

How to use it

1 capsule with breakfast and dinner during a cleanse cycle (commonly 2–4 weeks), or as directed by your practitioner. Not for use in pregnancy.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Gluten free, sugar free, dairy free, vegetarian, SA-made.

Magnesium oxide osmotic cleanse.

What it does

A purpose-built osmotic cleanse: magnesium oxide is deliberately chosen here precisely because it stays in the gut, draws in water, and clears the colon. The same low-absorption property that makes oxide a poor daily magnesium makes it the right tool for this job — that's form-follows-function formulation.

How to use it

Start with 2 capsules in the evening with a full glass of water, increase gradually until you find your clearance dose. Short-term use; not a daily magnesium supplement — for that, choose a glycinate.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Gluten free, sugar free, dairy free, vegetarian, SA-made.

Magnesium oxide flexible-dose powder.

What it does

The flexible-dose version of our osmotic colon cleanse. Powder lets you titrate by the quarter-teaspoon, which matters because clearance doses vary widely from person to person. Magnesium oxide stays in the gut, draws in water, and clears — the right form for this job.

How to use it

Start with ¼ teaspoon in warm water in the evening; adjust gradually. Short-term use during a cleanse or reset week.

ATP-supporting energy substrate.

What it does

D-ribose is the sugar backbone of ATP — the energy currency itself. Hearts and muscles under strain (endurance training, chronic fatigue, post-viral recovery) burn through ATP faster than they can rebuild it; ribose shortcuts the rebuild. This is biochemistry, not a stimulant.

How to use it

One scoop (≈5 g) in water, 1–2 times daily — before and after training, or morning and midday for fatigue support. It tastes mildly sweet; it is not a table sugar substitute.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Vegan, gluten free, sugar free, dairy free, vegetarian, SA-made.

Supplements support a good routine — they don't replace one. If you take chronic medication, check with your pharmacist before combining.

Targeted joint and mobility support.

What it does

Our most complete joint formula — built for knees, hips, and hands that work for a living. The formulation combines the cartilage-matrix nutrients with botanical anti-inflammatories, because mobility is a two-front problem: rebuild the cushion, calm the fire.

How to use it

2 capsules twice daily with meals. Joint nutrients are slow infrastructure — commit to 8–12 weeks. Pairs well with MSM on heavy-load weeks.

On the label

Amino acid for gut and recovery.

What it does

The most abundant amino acid in your body and the primary fuel of the cells lining your gut. Heavy training, chronic stress, and gut irritation all drain it faster than diet replaces it. Powder form, because effective gut-repair doses are bigger than capsules can carry.

How to use it

One teaspoon (≈5 g) in cold water on an empty stomach, 1–2 times daily. For gut-lining work, consistency over 4–8 weeks is the whole game.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Suits

Vegan, vegetarian, SA-made.

Supplements support a good routine — they don't replace one. If you take chronic medication, check with your pharmacist before combining.

Hepatic and renal detox support.

What it does

A two-organ botanical detox formula built around the classic hepatics and renal herbs of Western herbalism. Your liver processes everything you absorb; your kidneys filter what's left. Supporting both at once is the old, sensible way to run a cleanse.

How to use it

1 capsule, 2–3 times daily with water, typically as a 4–6 week course at season change. Drink more water than usual while taking it.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Endocrine adaptogen for hormonal balance.

What it does

Peruvian maca root — an endocrine adaptogen traditionally used for hormonal balance, energy, and libido in both men and women. Unlike stimulants, maca doesn't push; it nudges the system that makes your own hormones.

How to use it

1–2 capsules with breakfast. Adaptogens build: expect the difference at week 3–4, not day 3.

Nutrient-dense moringa leaf.

What it does

The most nutrient-dense leaf in African agriculture — moringa is a true food supplement: protein-complete, mineral-rich, and loaded with chlorophyll and antioxidants. Grown widely across Southern Africa. This is daily nutritional insurance from a plant, not a lab.

How to use it

2–3 capsules daily, any time, with or without food. Treat it like a green vegetable in capsule form.

On the label

The full active panel — every ingredient, exact milligrams — is printed on the bottle. No proprietary blends, nothing hidden. We're digitising every label panel for this site; if you'd like it now, WhatsApp us and we'll send a photo of the exact label same-day.

Vegan, gluten free, sugar free, vegetarian, SA-made.

Supplements support a good routine — they don't replace one. If you take chronic medication, check with your pharmacist before combining.

Soothing respiratory and bronchial support.

What it does

Mullein (Verbascum thapsus) is the lung herb of traditional European and African herbalism — used for centuries where chests feel tight, husky, or slow to clear. The leaf's saponins help loosen and move mucus, while its mucilage coats and calms irritated airways. People reach for it through dusty Highveld winters, after flu, and in homes with fireplaces.

How to use it

1 capsule, 2–3 times daily with water. Steady daily use through the risk season beats sporadic large doses. Pairs well with Buffered C in winter.

On the label

360 mg mullein herb extract per capsule — printed on the bottle.

Suits

Gluten free, sugar free, vegetarian, SA-made.

Supplements support a good routine — they don't replace one. If you take chronic medication, check with your pharmacist before combining.

Molecularly distilled EPA/DHA.

What it does

Molecularly distilled fish oil for EPA and DHA — the two omega-3s your brain, heart, and joints actually use. Distillation strips heavy metals and concentrates the actives. Most South Africans eat almost no oily fish; this closes that gap.

How to use it

1–2 capsules with your largest meal. Fat-soluble — never on an empty stomach. Keep the bottle away from heat.

On the label

Saw palmetto, zinc and selenium blend.

What it does

A targeted men's formula built around saw palmetto — the best-studied botanical for prostate comfort and night-time urination frequency — with zinc and selenium, the two minerals most concentrated in healthy prostate tissue.

How to use it

1 capsule twice daily with food. Saw palmetto trials run 12 weeks — commit to that before judging. Worth discussing with your GP alongside your regular PSA screening.

Nutrient-dense green algae.

What it does

The blue-green micro-algae that's earned its place in daily-nutrition stacks: complete protein, B-vitamins, iron in an absorbable form, and the antioxidant phycocyanin. Powder form for smoothie households.

How to use it

1 teaspoon in a smoothie or juice daily. Iron content makes it especially useful for plant-based eaters and menstruating women.

On the label

Curcumin for joint, brain and gut support.

What it does

Whole-spectrum turmeric for daily joint, gut, and cellular support. Curcumin — the golden pigment — is one of the most-studied botanicals on earth, but it's poorly absorbed on its own. Take it with black pepper or a fatty meal and it becomes a workhorse. This is the family-size bottle for households where everyone takes it.

How to use it

1–2 capsules daily with your largest meal (fat improves curcumin uptake). Add a grind of black pepper if your meal has none. Doubles well on heavy training days.

On the label

Artemisia annua for gut and immune support.

What it does

Artemisia — the bitterest herb in the dispensary and the second leg of the traditional cleanse trio. Beyond parasite protocols, wormwood is a classic bitter: a few drops of bitterness before meals primes the whole digestive cascade.

How to use it

1 capsule with breakfast and dinner during a cleanse cycle (commonly 2–4 weeks), usually alongside Black Walnut and Clove. Not for long-term continuous use; not in pregnancy.
